items.title: [负面] 这款游戏不建议任何人入坑。首先这个游戏bug很多非常影响游戏体验。其次这个游戏的游戏策划非常脑子有问...
items.summary: 这款游戏不建议任何人入坑。首先这个游戏bug很多非常影响游戏体验。其次这个游戏的游戏策划非常脑子有问题，在最新的一次更新中，TA新增了机制，需要重复抽取16个角色（期望抽数是六百五十抽）才能体验一个角色的完整机制。不充钱的话大概一年左右就能体验到一个角色的完整机制了非常良心（×）。以及这个游戏的策划非常傲慢不怎么听取玩家的建议，最近也改变了原来的路子开始往圈钱方向发展了。这已经不是一周年时的忘却前夜了，老玩家应当及时抽身离开，新玩家千万三思不要跳进这个火坑。

items.title: [正面] 今天发现游戏的登录界面，开场PV变了，是这次版本更新改了，还是我推主线过了限定章节才换的

items.title: [正面] Nunca he sido fan del género, pero la historia y d...
items.summary: Nunca he sido fan del género, pero la historia y diseño de personajes de este juego me replanteó esa idea. Obra maestra 10/10, denle un chance de enamorarse del juego :3

items.title: [正面] Pretty easy to figure out, has some creepy factor ...
items.summary: Pretty easy to figure out, has some creepy factor to it. Build characters but not a play to win like a lot of Gacha games are these days. Characters are cool. Be careful though. They weren't supposed to have maintenance until the next day and I got kicked mid game the day before so I was NOT happy.

items.title: [正面] Fun game, not p2w, amazing soundtrack, stunning ar...
items.summary: Fun game, not p2w, amazing soundtrack, stunning art, great combat, compelling story, fun mission system, good diffulcuty, all around an amazing game

items.title: [正面] this game is really really good as a first time ro...
items.summary: this game is really really good as a first time rouge-lite player!!! its fun and easy to get into, the artstyle is BEAUTIFUL and it has a really cool gacha system
